title: Nutty Fluffy Lazy Sunday Chicken Thighs
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring chicken thighs cooked in a nutty-flavored sauce that's perfect for a lazy Sunday brunch.

ingredients.name: Pumpkin Seeds
ingredients.notes: Roasted beforehand for added flavor and texture

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: Mashed with a pinch of salt for added depth

ingredients.name: Red Onion Slices
ingredients.notes: For color and sweetness complementing the dish

ingredients.name: White Wine
ingredients.notes: Any white wine for a touch of acidity and complexity

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: To emulsify the sauce and enhance the nuttiness

instructions: Season chicken thighs with salt, pepper, and a pinch of thyme.
Coat both sides of chicken with olive oil, including on the skin side for added crunchiness.
Place chicken in a baking dish skin-side up. Arrange red onion slices and garlic clove mash evenly over each thigh.
Drizzle white wine over chicken, cover tightly with foil to seal in moisture, then place into preheated oven for 30 minutes.
Remove foil and top chicken thighs with pumpkin seeds, ensuring they are not touching the meat to prevent burning. Return to oven.
Bake until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C) for optimal doneness, approximately 25-30 more minutes based on size of pieces.
Remove from oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
